page_metadata.biotools__summary: A manually curated database of experimentally supported enhancers for human and mouse. Enhancers are a class of cis-regulatory elements that can increase gene transcription by forming loops in intergenic regions, introns and exons
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A manually curated database of experimentally supported enhancers for human and mouse. Enhancers are a class of cis-regulatory elements that can increase gene transcription by forming loops in intergenic regions, introns and exons
